title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pearson India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pearson India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
